title: MATLAB code for summer precipitation reconstruction in the Loess Plateau using the Principal Component Regression (PCR) method and multi-source reanalysis data assessment
author: Fang, Congxi
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Filename 
 
 
 
 Description 
 
 
 
 
 
  bgt_wtr_func_lp.m  
 
 
 
 Script for water vapor equation budget over the LP 
 
 
 
 
 
  calc_dep_anal.m  
 Function for calculating anomaly and its percentile in a special year  
 
 
  calc_reg_anal.m  
 Function for calculating and testing regression coefficients in linear regression analysis 
 
 
  calc_seg_eof.m  
 Function for nested EOF decomposition 
 
 
  dep_pr_case2829.m  
 Script for plotting Figure 2 
 
 
  dep_reg_circ_case2829.m  
 Script for plotting atmospheric circulation anomalies (Figure 4) in regression analysis and anomalies in cases 28-29 
 
 
  dep_reg_sst_case2829.m  
 Script for plotting sea surface temperature anomalies in regression analysis and anomalies in cases 28-29 
 
 
  dep_reg_wvf_case2829.m  
 Script for plotting moisture flux and its divergence anomalies in regression analysis and anomalies in cases 28-29 
 
 
  eof.m  
 Function for EOF decomposition 
 
 
  fist_srprlp.m  
 Script for plotting Figure 3 
 
 
  get_isr.m  
 Function for locating the selected grid data based on the longitude and latitude coordinates 
 
 
  make_splitcv_table.m  
 Function for converting the value from split calibration-verification to a table 
 
 
  recon_lppr_nest_pcr.m  
 Script for nested   Principal Component Regression (PCR) of summer precipitation reconstruction over the LP 
 
 
 
  calc_split_cv.m  
 
 Function for split calibration-verification
